hooks.command: FILE_PATH="$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",d.get("path","")))' 2>/dev/null)"; if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.tsx || "$FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]]; then cd /Users/prem/Documents/Aira\ Ai/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -20; fi

FILE_PATH="$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",d.get("path","")))' 2>/dev/null)"; if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py && "$FILE_PATH" != *__pycache__* && "$FILE_PATH" != *seed_* ]]; then cd /Users/prem/Documents/Aira\ Ai/backend && python -m py_compile "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 && echo "syntax OK: $FILE_PATH"; fi

FILE_PATH="$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",d.get("path","")))' 2>/dev/null)"; if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == */routes/*.py ]]; then if ! grep -q 'tenant_id' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[TENANT-AUDIT] WARNING: $FILE_PATH has no tenant_id reference — verify isolation"; fi; fi
cd /Users/prem/Documents/Aira\ Ai/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo 'Frontend type check done'
